title: Petrocodon guangxiensis
taxonomy: Petrocodon guangxiensis is classified within the plant kingdom, specifically within the division Magnoliophyta or flowering plants. Further classification places it in the class Magnoliopsida, also known as dicotyledonous flowering plants. Within the class, it belongs to the order Lamiales. The family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the African violet family, is the next level of classification for Petrocodon guangxiensis. At the genus and species level, it is classified as Petrocodon guangxiensis.
